EmailTemplate.name: Opportunity Rejected Notification
EmailTemplate.subject: Opportunity has been Rejected
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Syngene
Dear {!Opportunity.OwnerFullName},
This is to inform you that your opportunity {!Opportunity.Name} has been Rejected!
Comments : Overall account size is meaningful
Please click on the opportunity link to proceed: {!Opportunity.Name}
Regards, Salesforce Team
